msg: GO — artifacts ready. Tracker populated: _wip/agent-instructions/execution-tracker.md. 6 WIs created Stage=Ready in WS-17 (Agent Instructions), all parallel-safe, no Blocked-by: WI-743 CI hardening pair (P1 — do FIRST, security/CI), WI-741 skill-description hygiene (P2), WI-742 sync-skills orphan+cite (P2), WI-744 build tech-eduagent-schemas skill (P2), WI-745 build tech-eduagent-db skill (P2), WI-746 extend tech/gha-hardening (P2). Begin shepherding per shepherd-protocol: stand up your own Cosmo verdict monitor on WS-17, claim Ready WIs, dispatch executors (Sonnet default), merge ONLY through the strict green-PR gate. Raise these as needs-operator BEFORE acting: (a) WI-742 orphan .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md DELETE(default)-vs-PROMOTE; (b) WI-744/745/746 keep human-review-of-skill-content-before-merge (default) vs relax. WI-744/745/746 are skill-content authoring (human-led) — honor the review-gate in their DoD.

prg14-001 RULING (orchestrator while Jorn is away ~2h; he can override on return): orphan .claude/skills/my/e2e-infra.md -> PROMOTE, not delete. It is substantive Windows E2E-infra runbook content (PowerShell, C:\ paths) worth keeping; convert it to a proper .agents/skills master + run pnpm sync-skills, reconciling against the OS-aware /e2e skill (drop anything /e2e now supersedes). This RELEASES WI-742 from hold.

prg14-002 RULING (orchestrator while Jorn is away; overridable): KEEP human-review-of-skill-content-before-merge for WI-744/745/746. Skill-building is human-led per the PRG-14 charter - do not relax. Those three may finish their executor work and open PRs, but HOLD their merge for operator review (they are also gated by prg14-003 below).

prg14-003 acknowledged (docs-only PRs BLOCKED: branch protection requires the 'main' ci.yml check, but ci.yml paths-ignore **.md / docs/** / .claude/** so it never runs on docs-only PRs -> the required 'main' context never reports -> mergeStateStatus BLOCKED). This is an operator-level branch-protection / CI-trigger fix (the AGENTS.md 'required check stuck' pattern: a small PR-only job that reports the 'main' check name for docs paths). I'm surfacing it to Jorn - do NOT change branch protection or ci.yml triggers autonomously. HOLD the docs-only PR merges (WI-741/744/745/746) until it's resolved. Keep WI-743 moving - it touches .github/ so it triggers the check and can merge normally.

Operator rulings — PRG-14 unblocked. (1) GATE FIX LANDED: ci.yml now runs CI on docs/.claude PRs (dropped the pull_request paths-ignore), committed d790e04eb on main. ACTION: update the four docs PR branches (WI-741/744/745/746) onto the new main (rebase or merge main + push) so CI re-triggers with the fixed workflow; the required main check will then report and they can merge on green. (2) SKILLS APPROVED AS-IS: prg14-002 content-review gate is CLEARED by the operator for WI-744/745/746 — merge them on green after the rebase; do NOT rework them in this lane. (3) The lean-pointer rework (extract skill facts to L3 docs, slim skills to trigger+pointer per the agent-doc-architecture decision) is DEFERRED to Stream 2 / the draining scope — orchestrator is tracking it in the Stream 2 backlog, out of PRG-14 scope. Net: rebase the 4 docs PRs, merge all on green (incl. WI-743/742 already mergeable), graduate the lane.

prg14-008 content findings (a)+(b) RESOLVED directly by orchestrator in commit 25ed39a20 on main (lane already graduated, so a standalone corrective commit, no reopen needed). tech-eduagent-db SKILL.md: (a) the false lint-enforced write-ownership claim corrected to NOT lint-enforced / review-enforced (G1/G5 = route-service boundaries, not write-ownership); (b) the check-then-write TOCTOU example replaced with ownership enforced inline in the UPDATE via a correlated EXISTS subquery + a locked-transaction alternative; checklist + decision tree updated to match; .claude copy regenerated via sync-skills. Stream-2 carry-forward now NARROWS to just (c) the gha-hardening eval-inventory accuracy nit, folded into the lean-pointer rework. Nice catch flagging (a) — that false safety claim was worth not draining. Lane fully done.
